key_insight: LapidaryEngine enables fully conversational crystal generation by using a pivot representation to translate between free-form language and crystal structures in both directions.
engineering_relevance: This moves materials design toward interactive, user-guided discovery workflows that can support iterative refinement, editing, and constraint satisfaction in real time.
method: Accepts free-form natural-language requests instead of requiring structured chemical inputs.
Uses a pivot representation as an intermediate form to enable bidirectional text↔crystal translation.
Supports iterative dialogue-style refinement for composition and structure edits.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports demonstrations on diverse tasks including insulator discovery, stability optimization, compositional modification, and structural editing, indicating broad interactive evaluation.
watch_item: The pivot-based bidirectional capability may depend on the quality and coverage of the intermediate representation, so performance on out-of-distribution materials or highly ambiguous requests may be limited.
